title: Word Compliance Agent Tasks

implementationGate.rule: Implementation MUST NOT start until referenced ADR is Accepted or a documented exception is approved.

scope.primaryGoal: Review generated tasks, use standards context, edit document directly in Word, and re-verify manually.
nonGoals: Fully automated re-verification on each edit

must.text: Display all active tasks in task panel while open.
Show title/summary, status, citation snippet, and source identifier for each task.
Support statuses: open, in_review, done, skipped, blocked.
Persist status both document-local and backend.
Use content controls by tag as primary document anchors.
Selecting task navigates and highlights mapped range.
If anchor missing, attempt text-search fallback relink when confidence is sufficient.
Refresh tasks after re-verification without restart.
Display citation/reference context from standards or external docs.
Create or update a Word comment anchored to mapped text for citation/reference context.
Define explicit API contract for list tasks, update status, rerun verification, citation context.

should.text: Preserve selected task after refresh when possible.

governancePolicies: Test and Development Data Handling Procedure
must: Use Microsoft 365 user identity (SSO/OAuth); no client embedded API keys.
Do not upload full document by default; send minimum snippets.
Apply PII redaction before backend call where configured.
Retain prompt/response/task action audits for 30 days.
Use HTTPS for all assets and API traffic.
Manifest domain allowlist must include all required task pane and Office.js call domains.
Produce/update threat model artifact before release.
Enable dependency and vulnerability scanning in CI.

controlMatrix.policy: Test and Development Data Handling Procedure
Test and Development Data Handling Procedure

contractsToProduce: OpenAPI endpoints for task list/status update/reverify/citation-context
JSON schema for structured task output with anchor metadata

acceptanceCriteria.then: all tasks are visible with statuses and citation summaries
status updates immediately and persists locally and in backend
document navigates and highlights mapped text
fallback search relinks automatically when confidence threshold is met

acceptanceCriteria.given: task is linked to in-document text
acceptanceCriteria.then: citation context is available as in-document note
updated tasks are fetched and shown

openQuestions: Final API schema for task status operations
